title: Expanded Drops [Cobblemon]
body:
![loho](https://i.imgur.com/nNjNmHW.png)

 

***

## Expanded Drops for Cobblemon

 

**Dependencies:**

#### This addon **NEEDS** to be placed in the **DATAPACK FOLDER** within your world folder. 

 

**OTHER MODS REQUIRED:**

*   Cobblemon  
      
    
    **OTHER MODS (not required):**
    
    *   Create

 

More mods are planned to be used in the future, all of which will be included in the modpack.

**_(modpack under construction)_**

***

 

This mod adds Shulker Shells and Wither Skulls to be dropped by pokemon. This allows for a player to play the game with Mobs turned off without losing out on the experience.    
  

More drops are planned to be added inorder to allow a play to play the game without Vanilla mobs installed.

  

***
